title: Ars Libratum
description: A configuration addon for Ars Nouveau to allow for more extensive balancing.
body:
# Ars Libratum
Ars Libratum is an addon for [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau) which allows you to configure aspects of the mod for more comprehensive balancing.

## Configuration Options
- The number of times a [Stabilized Warp Scroll](https://www.arsnouveau.wiki/category/equipment/entry/stable_warp_scroll) can be used before it breaks.
- Max stack size for [Stabilized Warp Scrolls](https://www.arsnouveau.wiki/category/equipment/entry/stable_warp_scroll) and [Normal Warp Scrolls](https://www.arsnouveau.wiki/category/equipment/entry/warp_scroll).
- The number of mid-air jumps allowed when using [The Ring of Jumping](https://www.arsnouveau.wiki/category/equipment/entry/jump_ring) before you must land.

The configuration file is located in your world's `serverconfig` folder.
